title: The MC Movie
description:
A pack based on the minecraft movie.
This pack contains mods I found to be installed in the minecraft movie as there not anywhere else 

Credit to : liamvz 
for modlist
body:
# The Mc Movie Mod
This pack is based on the minecraft movie

##

## Extra Info

This Modpack is based on the video by liamvz about the mc movie it uses mods there where such as create 


**Please understand in no way is this a rpg type remake instead this mod pack uses the mods found to be in the movie visual or others**

### What is to come

There is a gun mod in the pack but it will soon be replaced by a mod that adds the tot launcher seen in the movie


Hey did you watch the minecraft movie did you think that was cool great me to so I went found the mods used in the movie so Train mods like create and others I have added those mods to a single modpack to give you a minecraft movie experience
